Title:
acos
, 
        asin
,

,

, 
        sin
, 
        tan
, 
        cot
, 
        degrees
, 
        radians
, 
        atan2
, 
        pi
Description:
All these functions work with double precision floating point numbers.
They convert their argument to an IEEE 64-bit float and return a result of that
type.
